examples: No matter how dry a desert may be, it is not necessarily lifeless.
While they may not be as dynamic as an iPad, textbooks are not passive or lifeless.
Nokia's pace has just recovered from a stumbling block in early 2004, when a lifeless production line reduces its markets share below 30%.
Then some trader on the Chicago Mercantile Exchange could swap his lifeless body in a millisecond.
Farmers also unloaded more than a thousand lifeless ducks into the Nan River in Sichuan province.
